name: Barotrauma Dedicated Server
description: Barotrauma dedicated server, installed via SteamCMD (anonymous - officially supported by the developers).

configFiles.description: Main server settings, written by GameDock on first install (edit via the File manager, then Update files won't overwrite it)
Content package / mod references, created after first run

notes: serversettings.xml is generated once on install from the variables above; edit it directly afterwards for anything not exposed here. On Debian 11+/Ubuntu 22.04+ the server can fail to start with a "no usable version of libssl" error since it links against the legacy libssl1.0 - if that happens, install a libssl1.0.0 package manually (no longer in default repos). No confirmed graceful console stop command was found during template research, so GameDock stops the process with SIGTERM; the game autosaves campaign progress periodically.
